
{{CargoRelic
|name=Gaea's Hand
|rank=SSS
|affct=FTH
|birthday=03-25
|source=Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.06%)
|description=On Mar 25, 2006 BC, Gaea, goddess of Earth, formed this broken arm.

Gaea's hand broke free from the ground. It is full of harmony, youth, and strength. It gives the people a spark of vitality. We could see both creation and destruction, order and chaos in her primal nature.
|fame=64
|art=71
|fth=108
|civ=50
|tech=69
|ss1=Snail ATK +30<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +5 W-tads<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +3% Demon Chests
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +10 W-tads<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +4% Demon Chests
|ss3=Snail ATK +50<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +15 W-tads<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +5% Demon Chests
|ss4=Snail ATK +70<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +25 W-tads<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +7% Demon Chests
|ss5=Snail ATK +90<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +35 W-tads<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +9% Demon Chests
|ss6=Snail ATK +120<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +50 W-tads<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +12% Demon Chests
|ss7=Snail ATK +120<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +50 W-tads<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +12% Demon Chests<br>Defeated Daily Hitmen drop +15 W-tads (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Quarry skill III.png|50px]]Place in Quarry: Stone Output +30%
|skill2=[[File:Quarry skill III.png|50px]]Place in Quarry: Quarry Max Cap +30%
|skill3=[[File:Quarry skill III.png|50px]]Place in Quarry: Find Ancient Fossil by +30%
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|Gaea's Hand}}
}}

[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Daily Hitmen White Tadpole Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Daily Hitmen Demon Chest Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Quarry Skill]]
[[Category:Quarry Output Boost]]
[[Category:Ancient Fossil Boost]]
[[Category:Reagent Crafting Boost]]
[[Category:Rewards Golden Pickaxe]]
[[Category:Catcolyte Boost]]
